truth_windows.locked_regression_benchmark: 2025; inspect only at an accept/reject checkpoint
truth_windows.prospective_final_judge: 2026 regular season; no relabeling or hindsight exclusions

synthetic_lines.purpose: historical ranking trend and regression testing only
synthetic_lines.construction: floor(strictly-prior player trailing mean) + 0.5; anytime TD is fixed at 0.5

matched_control.fallback: research_only when a required key or stratum is unavailable

narrative_factors.policy: shadow only until matched-control, multiplicity, and season-forward gates all pass

acceptance.shared_core_changes: serialize both tracks and rerun both suites

forward_clv.comparison: entry versus same-side cross-book consensus close
forward_clv.unresolved_policy: exclude and report exact unresolved n

operations.bye_week_checkpoint: after Week 8: data/schema audit, calibration review, no lever promotion without the same gates
operations.public_baselines: external until source, timestamp, scoring, coverage, and redistribution rights are pinned
operations.compute_budget: record rows, simulations, runtime, seed, and package versions for every distribution audit
